about.title: About AdmireTech
about.subtitle: Incorporated in England since 2015 — building the future of AI-driven businesses across three continents.
about.missionText: To democratise AI technology and make it accessible for businesses of every size, from startups in Lagos to enterprises in London.
about.storyText: Incorporated in England in 2015 by Peter King, AdmireTech grew from a boutique development consultancy into a global AI agency spanning 7 countries and 3 continents.
about.teamSubtitle: 13 specialists across 7 countries — united by a passion for AI that works
